name: @nube/source-picker
description: A reusable, transport-agnostic data-source picker for React — the Lazybones dashboard's 'pick a value from the DB / datasources / Zenoh (live series) / flows / extension widgets' machinery, extracted so any surface (dashboard, extensions) reuses one picker. Headless model + hooks + a props-driven UI; the host injects how to reach the node (SourceLoaders), so it works from the shell gateway OR an extension bridge. Self-themed via scoped hsl(var()) tokens, host-overridable.
